name: Cataclysmic Circumpolar Chilblainia
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>禍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>チルブレイン
desc: If a face-up WATER monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then you can send 1 random card from your opponent's hand to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Cataclysmic Circumpolar Chilblainia" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a face-up WATER monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then you can send 1 random card from your opponent's hand to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Cataclysmic Circumpolar Chilblainia" once per turn.
eff: If a face-up WATER monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then you can send 1 random card from your opponent's hand to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Cataclysmic Circumpolar Chilblainia" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Sends from your opponent's hand to your opponent's Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
